benefits.description: Initially responded very well to reta at 2.5-3mg in Nov/Dec 2025; lost effect after a 20-day break and return to 3mg, then 5mg

side_effects.description: Loss of efficacy / tachyphylaxis after a 20-day trip off reta; returning to 3mg and then bumping to 5mg produced little effect

protocol_notes: User initially used reta 2.5-3mg starting Nov/Dec 2025 with strong response. Took a ~20-day break during travel. Upon return at 3mg experienced minimal effect; escalated to 5mg with still little response. Seeking advice on dose splitting and washout reset protocol. Concerned about losing prior fat loss results.
